query: SELECT id, fleet_mode, status, completed, total_ideas, started_at, completed_at, run_date, created_at FROM founder_agent_runs WHERE run_date IN ('2026-05-10', '2026-05-11') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2dg2iR9orw75o4J.0aefcec34322 --database 7EnctkaNppkKLbjFfnH6YY --execute SELECT id, fleet_mode, status, completed, total_ideas, started_at, completed_at, run_date, created_at FROM founder_agent_runs WHERE run_date IN ('2026-05-10', '2026-05-11') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
